message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam responseMessageBelowArrow true
skinparam ParticipantPadding 30
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor User

participant "«main»\nAdministration" as Admin
participant "«JFrame»\nMain Menu" as MainMenu
participant "«dialog»\nView Products" as ViewProducts
participant "«DAO»\nProductManagerdao" as PMDao
participant "«DAO»\nDbConnection" as DbConn

Admin -> MainMenu : construct
activate MainMenu

User -> MainMenu : click "view products" button
MainMenu -> ViewProducts : construct
activate ViewProducts

ViewProducts -> PMDao : construct
activate PMDao

ViewProducts -> PMDao : getProducts()
PMDao -> DbConn : getConnection(uri);
activate DbConn
DbConn --> PMDao : connection
deactivate DbConn

PMDao -> PMDao : prepareStatement(sql)
PMDao -> PMDao : executeQuery()
PMDao -> PMDao : getters retrieve product details
PMDao -> PMDao : setters set product details

PMDao --> ViewProducts : product
deactivate PMDao

ViewProducts -> ViewProducts : setModel(displayProducts)

User -> ViewProducts : enter a product ID in search bar
User -> ViewProducts : user clicks "search" button

ViewProducts -> ViewProducts : searchbyIDTxt.getText()
ViewProducts -> PMDao : searchProduct(searchID)
activate PMDao

PMDao -> DbConn : getConnection(uri);
activate DbConn
DbConn --> PMDao : connection
deactivate DbConn

PMDao -> PMDao : perpareStatement(sql)
PMDao -> PMDao : setString(1, searchProdID)
PMDao -> PMDao : executeQuery()
PMDao -> PMDao : getters retrieve product details
PMDao -> PMDao : setters set product details

PMDao --> ViewProducts : product searched for (p)
deactivate PMDao

ViewProducts -> ViewProducts : updateItems(returnedProduct)

User <- ViewProducts : waiting for further user action

deactivate ViewProducts
deactivate MainMenu
@enduml
```
